projects.name: Agent Owner Action Board
projects.current_checkpoint: The owner posted the selected r/ClaudeAI comment, but a non-owner web check did not show the repo URL or comment content yet.
projects.blocker: The Reddit comment visibility is unverified; the 24-hour exposure window should not start until a public comment permalink or logged-out view confirms visibility.

owner_actions.what: Provide the direct comment permalink or confirm from logged-out/incognito view that the comment with the GitHub repo link is visible.
owner_actions.why: The agent should not start a 24-hour demand read from a hidden or filtered comment.

owner_actions.what: If the Reddit comment is visible, check repo views, unique visitors, clones, stars, issues, and comments 24 hours after the visible timestamp.
owner_actions.why: The first demand read should be based on a valid visible exposure window.

next_review.reason: 24-hour read only if the Reddit comment is publicly visible; otherwise choose another visible channel
